close_reason: Added docs/user-manual/src/configuration/turnkey-directory.md covering isolation directory convention, tool-specific behavior, and Jest/Vitest configuration examples.
description:
Document the .turnkey isolation directory convention and its benefits.

Topics to cover:
- Why we use .turnkey as the default isolation dir
- How Go, Cargo, and other tools ignore dot-prefixed directories
- The --isolation-dir translation behavior in tk
- Migration notes (one-time cache invalidation)
- How to use multiple isolation dirs (.turnkey-foo, .turnkey-bar)

Tool-specific behavior:
- Go: Automatically ignores directories starting with . or _ (built-in)
- Cargo: Doesn't auto-discover crates in dot directories (built-in)
- pytest: Automatically ignores dot directories (built-in)
- Jest: Requires testPathIgnorePatterns config: ['/node_modules/', '/buck-out/', '/\\.']
- Vitest: Requires exclude config: ['**/node_modules/**', '**/buck-out/**', '**/.*/**']

Include example Jest/Vitest configs for JS/TS projects.

Location: docs/ or update existing Buck2 documentation
title: Document .turnkey isolation dir convention
